proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative relationship).
Patients with stage_iv=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with stage_iv=0.
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive relationship).

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ ecog_ps: coef[ecog_ps]=-1.1897, p=0, n=50000.
pfs_months mean: 3.703 when stage_iv=1 (n=27481) vs 5.055 when stage_iv=0 (n=22519); Welch t-test p=0, diff=-1.352.
OLS pfs_months ~ albumin_g_dl: coef[albumin_g_dl]=0.4654, p=3.25e-115, n=50000.

proposed_hypotheses.text: kras_mutation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than kras_mutation=0.
braf_v600e=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than braf_v600e=0.
msi_high=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than msi_high=0 in this cohort overall.
right_sided_primary=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than right_sided_primary=0.

analyses.result_summary: pfs_months mean: 4.121 when kras_mutation=1 (n=20898) vs 4.448 when kras_mutation=0 (n=29102); Welch t-test p=1.86e-58, diff=-0.327.
pfs_months mean: 4.094 when braf_v600e=1 (n=2272) vs 4.322 when braf_v600e=0 (n=47728); Welch t-test p=3.47e-07, diff=-0.228.
pfs_months mean: 4.293 when msi_high=1 (n=2513) vs 4.313 when msi_high=0 (n=47487); Welch t-test p=0.68, diff=-0.019.
pfs_months mean: 4.114 when right_sided_primary=1 (n=17657) vs 4.419 when right_sided_primary=0 (n=32343); Welch t-test p=1.04e-49, diff=-0.305.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_cetuximab=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_cetuximab=0 overall.
treatment_bevacizumab=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_bevacizumab=0.
treatment_pembrolizumab=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_pembrolizumab=0 overall.
treatment_encorafenib=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_encorafenib=0 overall.
treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=0 overall.
treatment_regorafenib=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_regorafenib=0.

analyses.result_summary: pfs_months mean: 4.285 when treatment_cetuximab=1 (n=15078) vs 4.323 when treatment_cetuximab=0 (n=34922); Welch t-test p=0.088, diff=-0.038.
pfs_months mean: 4.301 when treatment_bevacizumab=1 (n=22383) vs 4.320 when treatment_bevacizumab=0 (n=27617); Welch t-test p=0.354, diff=-0.019.
pfs_months mean: 4.316 when treatment_pembrolizumab=1 (n=7660) vs 4.311 when treatment_pembrolizumab=0 (n=42340); Welch t-test p=0.856, diff=0.005.
pfs_months mean: 4.316 when treatment_encorafenib=1 (n=5111) vs 4.311 when treatment_encorafenib=0 (n=44889); Welch t-test p=0.873, diff=0.005.
pfs_months mean: 4.271 when treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=1 (n=4033) vs 4.315 when treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=0 (n=45967); Welch t-test p=0.244, diff=-0.044.
pfs_months mean: 5.089 when treatment_regorafenib=1 (n=10022) vs 4.117 when treatment_regorafenib=0 (n=39978); Welch t-test p=1.71e-216, diff=0.972.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among kras_mutation=0 (wild-type) patients, treatment_cetuximab=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_cetuximab=0.
Among kras_mutation=1 patients, treatment_cetuximab=1 does NOT prolong pfs_months relative to treatment_cetuximab=0 (no benefit or harm).
There is a significant treatment_cetuximab × kras_mutation interaction on pfs_months: cetuximab effect is more positive in KRAS wild-type than in KRAS mutant.

analyses.code: stats.ttest_ind on subgroup Cetuximab effect among KRAS wild-type
analyses.result_summary: Cetuximab effect among KRAS wild-type: pfs_months mean 4.415 (treatment_cetuximab=1, n=8821) vs 4.463 (treatment_cetuximab=0, n=20281); diff=-0.048, p=0.122.

analyses.code: stats.ttest_ind on subgroup Cetuximab effect among KRAS mutant
analyses.result_summary: Cetuximab effect among KRAS mutant: pfs_months mean 4.102 (treatment_cetuximab=1, n=6257) vs 4.130 (treatment_cetuximab=0, n=14641); diff=-0.028, p=0.376.
Interaction coef treatment_cetuximab:kras_mutation in OLS pfs_months ~ cet*kras

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among msi_high=1 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_pembrolizumab=0.
Among msi_high=0 (MSS) patients, treatment_pembrolizumab=1 does NOT prolong pfs_months meaningfully relative to treatment_pembrolizumab=0.
There is a significant treatment_pembrolizumab × msi_high interaction on pfs_months, with the pembrolizumab effect larger in MSI-high patients.

analyses.code: stats.ttest_ind on subgroup Pembrolizumab effect among MSI-high
analyses.result_summary: Pembrolizumab effect among MSI-high: pfs_months mean 4.299 (treatment_pembrolizumab=1, n=396) vs 4.292 (treatment_pembrolizumab=0, n=2117); diff=0.007, p=0.957.

analyses.code: stats.ttest_ind on subgroup Pembrolizumab effect among MSS
analyses.result_summary: Pembrolizumab effect among MSS: pfs_months mean 4.317 (treatment_pembrolizumab=1, n=7264) vs 4.312 (treatment_pembrolizumab=0, n=40223); diff=0.005, p=0.861.
Interaction coef treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among braf_v600e=1 patients, treatment_encorafenib=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_encorafenib=0.
Among braf_v600e=0 patients, treatment_encorafenib=1 does NOT prolong pfs_months meaningfully relative to treatment_encorafenib=0.
Significant treatment_encorafenib × braf_v600e interaction on pfs_months: benefit concentrated in BRAF V600E mutated patients.

analyses.code: stats.ttest_ind on subgroup Encorafenib effect among BRAF V600E
analyses.result_summary: Encorafenib effect among BRAF V600E: pfs_months mean 3.979 (treatment_encorafenib=1, n=242) vs 4.108 (treatment_encorafenib=0, n=2030); diff=-0.129, p=0.329.

analyses.code: stats.ttest_ind on subgroup Encorafenib effect among BRAF wild-type

Interaction coef treatment_encorafenib:braf_v600e

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among her2_amplified=1 patients, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=0.
Among her2_amplified=0 patients, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=1 does NOT prolong pfs_months meaningfully relative to treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=0.
Significant treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib × her2_amplified interaction on pfs_months: benefit concentrated in HER2-amplified patients.

Interaction coef treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib:her2_amplified

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_cetuximab benefit on pfs_months is smaller (or absent) among right_sided_primary=1 vs right_sided_primary=0 patients (negative interaction).
Among nras_mutation=1 patients, treatment_cetuximab=1 does NOT prolong pfs_months relative to treatment_cetuximab=0 (resistance).
Among braf_v600e=1 patients, treatment_cetuximab=1 does NOT prolong pfs_months relative to treatment_cetuximab=0 (BRAF mutation confers resistance to anti-EGFR alone).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction treatment_cetuximab:right_sided_primary

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher age_years is associated with shorter pfs_months.
sex_female=1 is associated with different pfs_months than sex_female=0 (sex effect).
rural_residence=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than rural_residence=0.
Patients with insurance_type='uninsured' have shorter pfs_months than patients with insurance_type='private'.
Mean pfs_months differs between race_ethnicity='black' and race_ethnicity='white' (test).

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ age_years: coef[age_years]=0.1765, p=0, n=50000.
pfs_months mean: 4.308 when sex_female=1 (n=22371) vs 4.314 when sex_female=0 (n=27629); Welch t-test p=0.77, diff=-0.006.
pfs_months mean: 4.331 when rural_residence=1 (n=10073) vs 4.307 when rural_residence=0 (n=39927); Welch t-test p=0.339, diff=0.024.

analyses.code: ttest pfs_months between uninsured and private

analyses.code: ttest pfs_months between black and white
analyses.result_summary: pfs_months: black mean 4.273 (n=5996) vs white 4.316 (n=32456); diff=-0.042, p=0.189.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for age, stage, albumin, ldh, liver_mets, ecog_ps remains negatively associated with pfs_months.
After adjusting for age, stage, ecog_ps, ldh, liver_mets, albumin_g_dl remains positively associated with pfs_months.
After adjusting for age, stage, ecog_ps, albumin, liver_mets, ldh_u_l remains negatively associated with pfs_months.
After adjusting for age, stage, ecog_ps, albumin, ldh, liver_mets remains negatively associated with pfs_months.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ age_years + stage_iv + ecog_ps + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + liver_mets', data=df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted ecog_ps: coef=-1.1793, p=0.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ age_years + stage_iv + ecog_ps + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + liver_mets', data=df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted albumin_g_dl: coef=0.4628, p=0.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ age_years + stage_iv + ecog_ps + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + liver_mets', data=df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted ldh_u_l: coef=-0.0004, p=1.5e-13.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ age_years + stage_iv + ecog_ps + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + liver_mets', data=df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted liver_mets: coef=-0.0074, p=0.564.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among kras_mutation=0 AND right_sided_primary=0 (left-sided KRAS-WT) patients, treatment_cetuximab=1 has the largest positive effect on pfs_months.
Among kras_mutation=0 AND right_sided_primary=1 (right-sided KRAS-WT) patients, treatment_cetuximab=1 has a smaller (or absent) effect on pfs_months than in left-sided KRAS-WT.
There is a 3-way treatment_cetuximab × kras_mutation × right_sided_primary interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.code: stats.ttest_ind on subgroup Cetuximab among left-sided, KRAS-WT
analyses.result_summary: Cetuximab among left-sided, KRAS-WT: pfs_months mean 4.577 (treatment_cetuximab=1, n=5780) vs 4.642 (treatment_cetuximab=0, n=13073); diff=-0.065, p=0.109.

analyses.code: stats.ttest_ind on subgroup Cetuximab among right-sided, KRAS-WT

3-way cetuximab × kras × right-sided

pfs_months mean: 4.267 when snp_rs4363657=1 (n=6020) vs 4.318 when snp_rs4363657=0 (n=43980); Welch t-test p=0.11, diff=-0.050.
pfs_months mean: 4.329 when snp_rs2070744=1 (n=19646) vs 4.300 when snp_rs2070744=0 (n=30354); Welch t-test p=0.159, diff=0.029.
pfs_months mean: 4.331 when snp_rs6025=1 (n=1520) vs 4.311 when snp_rs6025=0 (n=48480); Welch t-test p=0.742, diff=0.020.
pfs_months mean: 4.273 when snp_rs1801197=1 (n=10908) vs 4.322 when snp_rs1801197=0 (n=39092); Welch t-test p=0.0458, diff=-0.049.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among msi_high=1 patients, the pembrolizumab effect on pfs_months is observed regardless of tp53_mutation status (i.e., tp53_mutation does not abrogate immunotherapy benefit).
Among msi_high=1 patients with braf_v600e=1, treatment_pembrolizumab=1 still prolongs pfs_months relative to treatment_pembrolizumab=0.
There is no significant treatment_pembrolizumab × age_years interaction on pfs_months in MSI-high patients (i.e., elderly MSI-high benefit similarly).

analyses.code: stats.ttest_ind on subgroup Pembro among MSI-high & tp53_mutation=1
analyses.result_summary: Pembro among MSI-high & tp53_mutation=1: pfs_months mean 4.310 (treatment_pembrolizumab=1, n=173) vs 4.262 (treatment_pembrolizumab=0, n=913); diff=0.048, p=0.802.

analyses.code: stats.ttest_ind on subgroup Pembro among MSI-high & BRAF V600E
analyses.result_summary: Pembro among MSI-high & BRAF V600E: pfs_months mean 4.361 (treatment_pembrolizumab=1, n=25) vs 4.386 (treatment_pembrolizumab=0, n=102); diff=-0.025, p=0.957.
Interaction pembrolizumab × age (whole cohort)

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, the treatment_cetuximab:kras_mutation interaction coefficient is negative (cetuximab loses benefit in KRAS mutant).
After adjustment, the treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high interaction coefficient is positive (pembrolizumab benefit concentrated in MSI-high).
After adjustment, the treatment_encorafenib:braf_v600e interaction coefficient is positive (encorafenib benefit concentrated in BRAF V600E).
After adjustment, the treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib:her2_amplified interaction coefficient is positive (T+T benefit concentrated in HER2-amplified).

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted cetuximab×KRAS: coef=0.0200, p=0.269.
Adjusted pembro×MSI: coef=0.0435, p=0.397.
Adjusted encorafenib×BRAF V600E: coef=-0.0425, p=0.505.
Adjusted T+T×HER2: coef=-0.0004, p=0.996.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A composite of high nlr and low albumin (poor systemic state) — proxied by NLR>median AND albumin<median — is associated with shorter pfs_months than the opposite quadrant.
Total symptom burden (sum of fatigue_grade, pain_nrs, dyspnea_grade, cough_grade, appetite_loss_grade) negatively correlates with pfs_months.

analyses.code: ttest poor vs good NLR/albumin quadrants
analyses.result_summary: pfs_months: poor (high NLR, low alb) mean 4.129 (n=11398) vs good 4.481 (n=13642); diff=-0.352, p=7.44e-34.
Spearman r(symptom_burden, pfs_months) = -0.0076, p=0.0893, n=50000.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among braf_v600e=0 patients, treatment_encorafenib=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than treatment_encorafenib=0 (off-target use is harmful or marker of poor prognosis).
Among her2_amplified=0 patients, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=1 is associated with shorter or no different pfs_months vs treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=0.
Among msi_high=0 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab=1 is associated with shorter or no different pfs_months vs treatment_pembrolizumab=0.

analyses.code: stats.ttest_ind on subgroup Encorafenib among BRAF wild-type
analyses.result_summary: Encorafenib among BRAF wild-type: pfs_months mean 4.333 (treatment_encorafenib=1, n=4869) vs 4.321 (treatment_encorafenib=0, n=42859); diff=0.013, p=0.718.

analyses.code: stats.ttest_ind on subgroup T+T among HER2 non-amplified
analyses.result_summary: T+T among HER2 non-amplified: pfs_months mean 4.271 (treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=1, n=3913) vs 4.317 (treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=0, n=44583); diff=-0.046, p=0.232.

analyses.code: stats.ttest_ind on subgroup Pembrolizumab among MSS
analyses.result_summary: Pembrolizumab among MSS: pfs_months mean 4.317 (treatment_pembrolizumab=1, n=7264) vs 4.312 (treatment_pembrolizumab=0, n=40223); diff=0.005, p=0.861.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After multivariable adjustment within kras_mutation=0 patients, treatment_cetuximab=1 has a positive coefficient on pfs_months.
After multivariable adjustment within msi_high=1 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab=1 has a positive coefficient on pfs_months.
After multivariable adjustment within braf_v600e=1 patients, treatment_encorafenib=1 has a positive coefficient on pfs_months.
After multivariable adjustment within her2_amplified=1 patients, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=1 has a positive coefficient on pfs_months.

analyses.code: OLS on subgroup: pfs_months ~ treatment_cetuximab + age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + liver_mets
analyses.result_summary: Cetuximab adj coef among KRAS wild-type (n=29102): adj coef[treatment_cetuximab]=-0.0220, p=0.177.

analyses.code: OLS on subgroup: pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab + age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + liver_mets
analyses.result_summary: Pembrolizumab adj coef among MSI-high (n=2513): adj coef[treatment_pembrolizumab]=0.0427, p=0.432.

analyses.code: OLS on subgroup: pfs_months ~ treatment_encorafenib + age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + liver_mets
analyses.result_summary: Encorafenib adj coef among BRAF V600E (n=2272): adj coef[treatment_encorafenib]=-0.0186, p=0.446.

analyses.code: OLS on subgroup: pfs_months ~ treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib + age_years + ecog_ps + stage_iv + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + liver_mets
analyses.result_summary: T+T adj coef among HER2-amplified (n=1504): adj coef[treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib]=0.0075, p=0.936.
